text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto was in the stands.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We talked for a bit. Apparently, Opera O invited
her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She said Opera O called herself the "star" of the
race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A star, huh.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But with the best of our generation here to vie for
a shield plaque...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess it isn't really an overstatement.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I almost feel relieved.
choice_data_list: But we're not about to lose either.
But we're not about to lose either.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Just don't expect me to put on some show.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All right... I'm off.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Raise your glasses. Pour out your blessings. Let
your joy and amazement overflow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Sing, you birds! Shine, you sun! And you, earth,
let your flora sprout from the ground!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A new chapter begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Are we really supposed to be cheering for
that?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Don't ask me! I don't know either, but...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
It's like I... It's like I... argh—I haven't the slightest
clue!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I won't indulge you. I don't want any part of your
opera mess.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: All I'm here to do is race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm going to race and win. That's all.
